summary: First comprehensive testing iteration completed. Core AI functionality (Ikigai extraction) works perfectly. Frontend UI fully functional with proper dark mode design. Authentication flow has integration issues preventing full dashboard/search testing.

critical_bugs.issue: get_current_user function fails with Cookie/Bearer token - session validation not working properly
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all authenticated endpoints (dashboard, search, connections)
critical_bugs.details: Database sessions are created but backend cannot validate them. May be related to CORS or cookie handling.

working_endpoints.details: AI extraction works perfectly - returns proper JSON with passion, skillset, mission, working_style_availability

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard, search, connections cannot be fully tested due to backend auth validation failure
integration_issues.workaround: Frontend UI loads correctly, but auth integration blocks functionality

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct SuperNetworkAI branding and dark mode design
Google OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com works correctly
Profile setup page loads and all form fields functional
CV textarea accepts input and displays properly
Ikigai extraction API integration works - AI successfully extracts passion, skillset, mission from CV text
Extract Ikigai button triggers API call and populates form fields
All form inputs (name, role selection, skills, portfolio) work correctly
Dark mode aesthetic matches design guidelines perfectly
Page routing and navigation works properly
Ikigai extraction endpoint returns proper JSON structure
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix backend session validation - get_current_user function not properly validating session tokens
Investigate Emergent Auth integration - session creation vs validation mismatch
Test auth flow with proper Emergent session_id exchange
Once auth is fixed, verify dashboard search functionality and connection requests work
Consider adding error handling for auth failures on frontend

success_percentage.backend_core: 80% - Ikigai extraction (core feature) works perfectly, auth validation fails
success_percentage.frontend_ui: 95% - All UI components functional, only auth-dependent features blocked
success_percentage.integration: 70% - Core AI integration works, auth integration needs fixes
